recommendations.title: Kim Ji-young: Born 1982
recommendations.overview: Kim Ji-young, an ordinary woman in her 30s, suddenly shows signs of being inhabited by other women from her life, past and present.

recommendations.title: Age of Heroes
recommendations.overview: The true story of the formation of Ian Fleming's 30 Commando unit, a precursor for the elite forces in the U.K.

recommendations.title: How to Marry a Millionaire
recommendations.overview: Three women set out to find eligible millionaires to marry, but find true love in the process.

recommendations.title: Sgt. Stubby: An American Hero
recommendations.overview: The true story of the most decorated dog in American military history - Sgt. Stubby - and the enduring bonds he forged with his brothers-in-arms in the trenches of World War I.

recommendations.title: We Are from the Future
recommendations.overview: Four present-day Russian men dig for Nazi memorabilia at a WWII battlefield. A wormhole lake sends them back to a battle in 1942 USSR.

recommendations.title: The Seven Deadly Sins: Grudge of Edinburgh Part 1
recommendations.overview: Tristan, the son of Meliodas and Elizabeth, inherits the power of the Goddess Clan and can heal people’s wounds and injuries, but he often ends up hurting others due to his inability to control his Demon Clan power. To protect his family, Tristan hea

recommendations.title: Despite Everything
recommendations.overview: Sara, Lucía, Sofía and Claudia are sisters, 4 modern women with very different personalities, who come together at their mother's funeral, after which they discover the man they've all called "dad" throughout their lives is not really their father. T

recommendations.title: And Soon the Darkness
recommendations.overview: Two young English women go on a cycling tour of the French countryside. When one of them goes missing, the other begins to search for her. But who can she trust?

recommendations.title: The Girl in the Book
recommendations.overview: The story of a young writer's transformation when her past invades her present.

recommendations.title: Bleeding Steel
recommendations.overview: A hardened special forces agent fights to protect a young woman from a sinister criminal gang. At the same time, he feels a special connection to the young woman, like they have met in a different life.
